final:
// // When sel is HIGH, subtract b from a; when sel is LOW, add a and b
module top_module(
   input [7:0] a,
   input [7:0] b,
   input sel,
   output reg [7:0] out
   );always @ (a, b, sel) begin
      if (sel == 1) begin
         out = a + b;
      end else begin
         out = a - b;
      end
   end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When sel is HIGH, subtract b from a; when sel is LOW, add a and b
